title: Migrate Application Tracker from Notion
userStory: As Steve, I want my Application Tracker rows in the graph so that 'status of my Acme application' returns a real answer.
acceptanceCriteria: migrate_application_tracker uses the Notion DB ID stored in the user's Notion reference memory
Each row produces an episode named 'Application: {company} - {role} ({status})'
Episode body is a structured paragraph mentioning company, role, source, date applied, current status, last touchpoint, notes
Verify: search_nodes('recent applications') returns expected companies; search_facts('applied to FDE roles in May') returns the right subset
